_comment: Flow 01 — EU full pattern at Grenchen LSZG (tower + separate Ground). Mirrors docs/xpwellysatc_manual_en.md §5 (Grenchen RWY 06 left traffic): Ground taxi clearance, Ground→Tower handoff, Tower takeoff, pattern (downwind → final), land, runway vacated, Ground taxi to parking. Position reports omit the spoken runway number because the intent parser treats single-digit spoken runway suffixes (e.g. 'runway zero six') as READBACK; the assigned runway is carried in msg.runway from the first clearance.
name: EU pattern — LSZG Grenchen (Tower + Ground)

say.text: Grenchen Ground Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo from parking request taxi

say.note: Step 2 — Ground: holding short, ready for departure (pattern)
say.text: Grenchen Ground Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo holding short ready for departure
Grenchen Tower Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo ready for departure
Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo midfield left downwind
Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo on final full stop

say.note: Step 6 — Tower: runway vacated, handoff back to Ground
say.text: Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo clear of the runway
Grenchen Ground Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo request taxi to general aviation parking
